notes: Channels with a real command (Cards, Wishlist, Extract XLM, Auto Trade, Settings) now show the actual working panel as soon as they're created, instead of a generic description.
The setup wizard now shows the S4T and Heartbeat addresses to use in your reroll tool right on the "Saved" screen.
Feedback now supports a title, an optional screenshot, and shows your Discord profile.
Fixed: channel panels sometimes appeared duplicated when editing them.
Panels now move to the bottom of the channel automatically after 5 minutes of use, and always move there when you run the command by hand.
Fixed: "Sync Channels" now detects and repairs webhooks that stopped working, without needing to delete the channel.
Fixed: the MuMu "Turn On" button now waits for the instance to actually finish starting before reporting its status.
The trade/injection automation is now protected against stuck confirmation windows, and no longer freezes waiting for a click that never comes.
